productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Solid Navy Blue Sweatshirts
description: CompositionNavy blue sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a round ribbed neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, adidas patented 3-Stripes in white on the shoulder and sleeves, brand name appliqued on the left chest and has a ribbed hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 40 degreesDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanWarm iron; do not iron on print/trims/logosEmbrace the winter fun this year in this trendy sweatshirt from adidas. The patented 3-Stripes enhance your sporty look, while the raglan sleeves offer absolute comfort. Wear it by itself or over t-shirts; pair it with jeans and canvas shoes for that perfect winter touche.Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
